# StayFresh

> Static archive of workflow research and patterns for AI-assisted development, with practical notes for keeping static sites useful and less scrapeable.

Use the thesis first for doctrine, then workflows for implementation patterns, then research for supporting evidence. Canonical HTML pages are listed below. Markdown mirrors are not published yet.

## Start Here

- [StayFresh](https://stayfresh.dev/): Homepage with the thesis, workflow index, and the GitHub Pages plus Anubis deployment pattern.
- [StayFresh Thesis](https://stayfresh.dev/thesis/): Best single starting point. Explains the site's position on reward surfaces, architecture, and comprehension debt.
- [Workflows](https://stayfresh.dev/workflows/): Index of practical workflow patterns.
- [Research](https://stayfresh.dev/research/): Index of supporting research notes.

## Site and Operations

- [Anubis in Front of GitHub Pages](https://stayfresh.dev/workflows/anubis-github-pages/): How to front a GitHub Pages site with Anubis using Caddy or Nginx without creating a proxy loop.
- [Instant Project Sync](https://stayfresh.dev/workflows/instant-project-sync/): Ticket-to-contract evidence sync for delivery operations.
- [psay Agent Notifications](https://stayfresh.dev/workflows/psay-agent-notify/): Operator alerts via local voice and notifications for long-running agent work.
- [Project AI Philosophy](https://stayfresh.dev/workflows/project-ai-philosophy/): How client AI policy gets translated into bounded operating rules.

## Agent Workflow Patterns

- [Preference TOML](https://stayfresh.dev/workflows/preference-toml/): Simple config shape for critique, selection, and evaluation loops.
- [Reward Rubric DSL](https://stayfresh.dev/workflows/reward-rubric-dsl/): Machine-readable rubric pattern for scoring agent output.
- [Prompt Patterns](https://stayfresh.dev/workflows/prompt-patterns/): Prompt structures that reduce token waste and instruction bloat.
- [Agent Psychology](https://stayfresh.dev/workflows/agent-psychology/): Observed behavior patterns for coding agents and how to use them.
- [CI Automation with AI Agents](https://stayfresh.dev/workflows/ci-automation/): Continuous integration patterns for agent loops, halting, and review.

## Research

- [Reward Engineering for Coding Agents](https://stayfresh.dev/research/reward-engineering/): Why rubrics shape agent behavior more than prompts.
- [Reward Hacking in Coding Agents](https://stayfresh.dev/research/reward-hacking/): Failure modes caused by narrow or gameable evaluation.
- [AGENTS.md Effectiveness](https://stayfresh.dev/research/agents-md-effectiveness/): Evidence on repository instruction files and why they often add cost without helping.
- [Formal Verification with Agents](https://stayfresh.dev/research/formal-verification-agents/): Property-based testing and specification generation with agents.
- [Enterprise Agent Design](https://stayfresh.dev/research/enterprise-agent-design/): Enterprise design patterns for production-grade agents.
- [Persona Anchors](https://stayfresh.dev/research/persona-anchors/): How named styles and persona anchors change agent behavior.

## Optional

- [RSS Feed](https://stayfresh.dev/rss.xml): Recent site updates in RSS 2.0 format.
- [Atom Feed](https://stayfresh.dev/atom.xml): Recent site updates in Atom 1.0 format.
- [JSON Feed](https://stayfresh.dev/feed.json): Machine-readable feed for applications that prefer JSON.
- [XML Sitemap](https://stayfresh.dev/sitemap.xml): Full canonical URL inventory for crawlers.
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/Evoke4350/stayfresh.dev): Source repository for the site.
